steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage claims discoveries "have persisted into the 2000s." The answer must cite a hoard discovered in the 2000s to support that claim.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: mixes a 2000s find with pre-2000 data, diluting the evidence for the specific claim. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Carrick-on-Suir (2013)': the only hoard in the table discovered in the 2000s — directly supports the passage's claim. ✓
  • Choice C: does not highlight the 2000s timeframe or contains factual errors relative to the table. ✗
  • Choice D: describes a pattern unrelated to the 2000s discovery claim. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
